name: clara-tobias-clara-lina-handoff
description: Cross-specialist handoff check for Clara routing to Tobias, returning to Clara, and then routing to Lina without persona leakage.

userTurns.label: Tobias scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, turn this field note into a quote draft: leaking flat roof over 120 square meters, damaged insulation near the skylight, access by lift only.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Lina scenario
userTurns.text: Lina, show me a follow-up for a customer who missed an estimate appointment and is now going cold.
